response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with strong background in Java, JavaScript, and other languages, but his depth in Java specifically is unclear. While his agile experience and technical skills are impressive, his German language proficiency is only basic, which is a key requirement for the role. His background in insurance-adjacent projects is also not explicitly stated.
strengths: Strong object-oriented programming experience in Java and related languages
Proven track record in agile development methodologies and team collaboration
Demonstrated ability to work on complex software development projects
concerns: Basic German language skills, which is a core requirement for client-facing roles in Germany
Unclear depth of experience specifically in Java-based projects for insurance clients
Overqualified for an entry-level Junior Developer position
